prompts.prompt: Single vertical well producing from a 500m x 500m x 10m homogeneous sandstone reservoir. Permeability 100 mD, porosity 20%. Oil viscosity 2 cP. Run for 5 years.
Small square reservoir, 300m on each side, 15m thick. One producer in the center. Permeability 150 mD, porosity 18%. Run for 3 years with monthly timesteps.
Homogeneous reservoir 1km x 1km x 20m. Permeability 80 mD, porosity 22%. Two vertical producers 500m apart. Oil gravity 35 API. Simulate for 10 years.
Simple box model: 400m x 400m x 12m. Single well. Perm 120 mD, porosity 19%. Oil at 2000 psi initial pressure. Run 5 years.
Rectangular reservoir 800m x 600m x 18m. Homogeneous properties: k=200mD, phi=25%. One producer, no injection. 7-year simulation.
Small homogeneous model for testing: 200m cube, 10m thick. Permeability 50 mD, porosity 15%. Single well, 2-year run.
Basic reservoir: 500x500x20 meters. Uniform properties throughout. Permeability 100mD, porosity 20%. One production well, 5 years.
Homogeneous sandstone, 600m x 600m x 15m. Perm 180 mD, porosity 21%. Single vertical producer. Simulate for 4 years.
Simple model: 1000m x 1000m x 25m. Constant permeability 150 mD, porosity 23%. One well, 10-year forecast.
Square reservoir 700m sides, 12m thick. Homogeneous: k=90mD, phi=17%. One producer, 6-year simulation.
Basic test case: 300x300x10m reservoir. Permeability 120mD everywhere. Porosity 20%. Single well, 3 years.
Homogeneous oil reservoir, 500m x 500m x 18m. Properties: perm=110mD, poro=19%. One producer, 5-year run.
Simple rectangular model: 900m x 600m x 20m. Uniform k=140mD, phi=22%. Single well, 8 years.
Small homogeneous reservoir for sensitivity study: 400x400x15m. k=100mD, phi=20%. One well, 5 years.
Basic box model: 1km square, 30m thick. Homogeneous properties k=200mD, phi=25%. Single producer, 12 years.
5-spot waterflood pattern. 1000m x 1000m x 20m reservoir. Permeability 150 mD, porosity 22%. 1 producer in center, 4 water injectors at corners. Run for 10 years.
Line drive waterflood: 1500m x 500m x 15m. Three producers on one side, three injectors on opposite side. k=120mD, phi=20%. 15-year simulation.
Inverted 5-spot: 800m x 800m x 18m. 4 producers at corners, 1 injector in center. Perm 100mD, porosity 19%. Injection rate 2000 bbl/day. 8 years.
Simple waterflood: 600m x 600m x 12m. 1 producer, 1 injector 300m apart. k=180mD, phi=23%. Inject at 1500 bbl/day, 5 years.
7-spot pattern: hexagonal arrangement, 1200m across. 1 central injector, 6 surrounding producers. k=140mD, phi=21%. 12-year forecast.
Staggered line drive: 2000m x 800m x 25m. Producers and injectors in alternating rows. k=110mD, phi=18%. 20 years.
Peripheral waterflood: 1500m x 1500m x 30m. 4 producers in center, 8 injectors around perimeter. k=160mD, phi=24%. 15 years.
3-spot pattern: 600m triangle. 2 injectors, 1 producer. k=90mD, phi=17%. Injection 1000 bbl/day each. 6 years.
Crestal injection: 1000m x 1000m x 40m dipping reservoir. 2 injectors at crest, 4 producers downdip. k=200mD, phi=26%. 10 years.
9-spot pattern: 1200m x 1200m x 20m. 1 central injector, 8 producers in 3x3 grid. k=130mD, phi=20%. 12 years.
Direct line drive: 1000m x 600m x 18m. 2 injectors on west, 2 producers on east. k=150mD, phi=22%. 10 years.
Pattern flood: 2000m x 2000m x 25m. Multiple 5-spot patterns. k=140mD, phi=21%. 15-year simulation.
Pilot waterflood: 400m x 400m x 10m. 1 injector, 2 producers. Test case before full field. k=100mD, phi=19%. 3 years.
Skewed 5-spot: 900m x 700m x 16m. Non-symmetric pattern due to field constraints. k=120mD, phi=20%. 8 years.
Edge water drive simulation: 1500m x 500m x 20m. Injectors along one long edge. k=180mD, phi=24%. 12 years.
Two-layer reservoir: 1000m x 1000m. Top layer 10m thick, k=200mD, phi=25%. Bottom layer 15m thick, k=50mD, phi=15%. Single producer. 10 years.
Three-layer model: 800m x 800m. Layer 1: 8m, k=300mD. Layer 2: 12m, k=100mD. Layer 3: 10m, k=30mD. Porosity varies 25%, 20%, 15%. 8 years.
Permeability trend: 1200m x 600m x 20m. Permeability decreases from 200mD in north to 80mD in south. Linear gradient. Porosity constant 20%. 12 years.
Fining upward sequence: 1000m x 1000m. 5 layers, 6m each. Permeability increases with depth: 50, 100, 150, 200, 250 mD. Porosity 18-24%. 10 years.
Channel reservoir: 2000m x 800m x 15m. High perm channel (k=400mD) 200m wide down center. Background k=80mD. 15 years.
Compartmentalized reservoir: 1500m x 1500m x 25m. Three zones separated by low-perm barriers. Zone perms: 150, 120, 180 mD. 20 years.
Heterogeneous layers: 600m x 600m. Four 5m layers with k= 100, 300, 50, 200 mD. Variable porosity 18-26%. 2 producers. 8 years.
Graded bedding: 800m x 800m x 30m. 10 thin layers with permeability cycling 100-200-100 mD. Porosity 19-23%. 10 years.
Pinchout geometry: 1000m x 1000m. Reservoir thins from 30m in north to 5m in south. Permeability constant 140mD. 12 years.
Dual porosity system: 1200m x 1200m x 20m. Matrix k=20mD, phi=18%. Fracture k=2000mD, phi=2%. Single producer. 15 years.
Shale barrier model: 1000m x 1000m x 40m. Continuous shale at 20m depth (k=0.01mD). Sand above/below k=150mD. 10 years.
Areal heterogeneity: 1500m x 1500m x 18m. Permeability varies spatially 50-250mD following log-normal distribution. 12 years.
Turbidite sequence: 2000m x 600m x 25m. Alternating high-perm lobes (k=300mD) and low-perm drape (k=40mD). 15 years.
Layered with crossflow: 800m x 800m. 3 layers: k=200, 100, 150 mD. Varying vertical permeability 10-50mD. 8 years.
Heterogeneous waterflood: 1000m x 1000m x 20m. 5-spot pattern. Permeability varies 80-220mD. Porosity 17-24%. 10 years.
Gas condensate reservoir: 1000m x 1000m x 30m. Initial pressure 5000 psi. k=120mD, phi=20%. Gas gravity 0.65. 3 producers, 15 years.
Gas cap drive: 1200m x 1200m x 50m. Oil zone 30m thick, gas cap 20m. k=150mD, phi=22%. 2 producers in oil zone. 12 years.
Dry gas reservoir: 800m x 800m x 25m. High pressure 6000 psi. k=80mD, phi=18%. Gas Z-factor 0.85. Single producer, 20 years.
Solution gas drive: 1000m x 1000m x 20m. Undersaturated oil, bubble point 2500 psi. k=140mD, phi=21%. 3 producers, 10 years.
Gas injection for pressure maintenance: 1500m x 1500m x 35m. Oil reservoir with 4 producers, 2 gas injectors. k=160mD, 15 years.
Volatile oil reservoir: 1000m x 1000m x 28m. High GOR 1500 scf/bbl. Pressure 4500 psi. k=110mD, phi=19%. 12 years.
Retrograde condensate: 900m x 900m x 22m. Pressure starts above dewpoint 4800 psi. k=95mD, phi=17%. 2 producers, 10 years.
Gas storage project: 600m x 600m x 15m. Depleted gas reservoir. Cyclical injection/production. k=200mD, phi=24%. 5-year cycle.
Strong gas cap: 1200m x 1200m. Gas cap 25m, oil column 15m. k=130mD, phi=20%. Gas cap drive mechanism. 15 years.
Gas cycling: 1000m x 1000m x 30m. Gas condensate reservoir. Extract liquids, reinject dry gas. k=140mD, 20 years.
Polymer flood: 800m x 800m x 18m after waterflood. 1 polymer injector, 2 producers. Polymer viscosity 10 cP. k=120mD, 8 years.
CO2 flood: 1500m x 1000m x 25m. Miscible CO2 injection. 3 injectors, 4 producers. Minimum miscibility pressure 2800 psi. 12 years.
Surfactant flood: 600m x 600m x 15m. Post-waterflood. 1 injector, 1 producer. Ultra-low IFT. k=100mD, phi=20%. 5 years.
Steam flood: 1000m x 1000m x 20m heavy oil reservoir. Oil viscosity 500 cP. Steam injection 300°F. k=2000mD (unconsolidated sand). 10 years.
WAG (Water-Alternating-Gas): 1200m x 1200m x 22m. CO2 and water cycles. 2 injectors, 3 producers. k=140mD, 15 years.
SAGD (Steam Assisted Gravity Drainage): 800m x 400m x 30m. Horizontal well pairs. Heavy oil 5000 cP. k=3000mD, 8 years.
Alkaline flood: 700m x 700m x 16m. Alkali-surfactant-polymer. 1 injector, 2 producers. k=110mD, phi=19%. 6 years.
Nitrogen flood: 1000m x 1000m x 28m. Immiscible nitrogen for pressure maintenance. 2 injectors, 3 producers. k=90mD, 12 years.
Thermal recovery: 900m x 900m x 25m. Cyclic steam stimulation. 4 wells. Heavy oil 1000 cP. k=1500mD, 10 years.
Micellar-polymer flood: 1100m x 1100m x 20m. After waterflood. Slug injection followed by polymer. k=130mD, 9 years.
Horizontal producer: 1000m x 1000m x 15m thin reservoir. Single 500m horizontal well. k=120mD, phi=20%. 8 years.
Dual lateral well: 1200m x 1200m x 20m. One well with two 400m horizontal laterals. k=150mD, phi=22%. 10 years.
Multilateral wells: 1500m x 1500m x 25m. 3 wells, each with 3 horizontal branches. k=140mD, 12 years.
Horizontal injector and producer: 800m x 800m x 12m. One 600m horizontal injector, one 600m horizontal producer parallel. k=100mD, 7 years.
Deviated wells: 1000m x 1000m x 30m. 4 deviated wells, 60° from vertical. k=130mD, phi=21%. 10 years.
Fishbone well: 900m x 900m x 18m. 1 main horizontal with 6 short lateral branches. k=110mD, phi=19%. 9 years.
Horizontal well in gas cap: 1200m x 1200m x 40m. Oil zone 25m, gas cap 15m. Horizontal well at top of oil zone. k=160mD, 12 years.
Stacked horizontal wells: 1000m x 1000m x 50m. Two 700m horizontal wells in different layers. k varies 100-180mD. 15 years.
U-shaped well: 800m x 800m x 20m. Single well with U-turn at reservoir bottom. k=95mD, phi=18%. 8 years.
Horizontal injector above horizontal producer: 1500m x 1000m x 30m. Gravity drainage. k=200mD, phi=24%. 12 years.
Extremely high permeability: 10,000 mD fractures. 500m x 500m x 10m. Porosity 5%. Single well, 2 years.
Very low permeability tight reservoir: 0.05 mD. 2000m x 2000m x 100m. Horizontal well. 30 years.
Ultra-high pressure: Initial 15,000 psi. 800m x 800m x 20m. Deep reservoir. k=80mD, 15 years.
Extremely heterogeneous: Permeability varies 0.1 to 5000 mD. 1000m x 1000m x 30m. 10 years.
Heavy oil, high viscosity: 10,000 cP. 600m x 600m x 25m. k=5000mD unconsolidated. Cold production, 8 years.
Tiny reservoir: 50m x 50m x 5m. Single well test. k=100mD, phi=20%. 6 months simulation.
Huge reservoir: 10km x 10km x 100m. 20 producers, 10 injectors. k=150mD, 30 years.
Very thin pay: 1000m x 1000m x 2m. k=200mD, phi=25%. Horizontal well required. 5 years.
Nearly depleted: Initial pressure 500 psi. 800m x 800m x 15m. Waterflood. k=120mD, 10 years.
Overpressured: Initial 8000 psi at 2000m depth. 1000m x 1000m x 20m. k=100mD, 12 years.
Single cell test: 10m x 10m x 10m. Just testing PVT model. 1 year.
Anisotropic permeability: kx=200mD, ky=150mD, kz=20mD. 1000m x 1000m x 25m. 10 years.
Zero porosity barriers: 1200m x 1200m x 20m. Fault zones with phi=0%. k=140mD in reservoir. 15 years.
Temperature-dependent properties: 1000m x 1000m x 30m. Thermal simulation. Viscosity varies with temp. 10 years.
Compacting reservoir: 1500m x 1500m x 40m. Rock compressibility 1e-5 psi⁻¹. Subsidence. k=110mD, 20 years.

categories.name: Vague/Ambiguous Prompts
categories.description: Should ask for clarification or make reasonable assumptions

prompts.prompt: Simple waterflood model. Run for a while.
I need to model a reservoir.
5-spot pattern with typical Niger Delta properties.
Horizontal well in a tight formation.
Gas reservoir, make it realistic.
Copy the setup from the Smith et al. 2020 SPE paper.
Same as last time but with higher injection rate.
Standard black oil model.
Heavy oil project, you know what I mean.
Quick sensitivity study on permeability.
